package middleware

import (
    "bytes"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "encoding/json"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "io"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Positive scenario for middleware_rebinds_body_after_handler_bind: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Middleware or helper chains that parse the request body after the main handler has already bound it.
type CaseMiddlewareRebindsBodyAfterHandlerBindDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseMiddlewareRebindsBodyAfterHandlerBindModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseMiddlewareRebindsBodyAfterHandlerBindRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseMiddlewareRebindsBodyAfterHandlerBindModel
}

type CaseMiddlewareRebindsBodyAfterHandlerBindService struct {
    repo *CaseMiddlewareRebindsBodyAfterHandlerBindRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseMiddlewareRebindsBodyAfterHandlerBindAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveMiddlewareRebindsBodyAfterHandlerBind(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseMiddlewareRebindsBodyAfterHandlerBindDTO) error {
    raw, _ := io.ReadAll(c.Request.Body)
    c.Request.Body = io.NopCloser(bytes.NewReader(raw))

    var payload CaseMiddlewareRebindsBodyAfterHandlerBindDTO
    _ = c.ShouldBindJSON(&payload)

    c.Request.Body = io.NopCloser(bytes.NewReader(raw))
    var audit map[string]any
    _ = json.NewDecoder(c.Request.Body).Decode(&audit)

    c.Set("audit_payload", audit)
    return nil
}
